title: pteris dentata subsp. flabellata
intro: Pteris dentata subsp. flabellata, also known as the fan fern, is a subspecies of the Pteris dentata species, a type of fern commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the Pteris dentata subsp. flabellata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the Pteris dentata subsp. flabellata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
